name: vigia
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ffmpeg && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://just.systems/install.sh | sudo bash -s -- --to /usr/local/bin && sudo corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate && npm install -g mprocs && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
